command:
echo "=== CHECK AUDIT PATH ==="
ls -la /opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/ 2>/dev/null || echo "PATH DOES NOT EXIST"

echo "=== CHECK N8N PROCESS USER ==="
ps aux | grep n8n | grep -v grep | awk '{print $1}' | head -3

echo "=== CHECK N8N CAN WRITE TO /opt ==="
ls -la /opt/ 2>/dev/null

echo "=== CHECK FILESYSTEM MODULE DATA PATH ==="
find /opt /home/jose -name "audit" -type d 2>/dev/null | head -5

echo "=== TEST: CAN N8N CODE NODE USE fs MODULE? ==="
node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('/tmp/n8n-audit-test', {recursive:true}); fs.writeFileSync('/tmp/n8n-audit-test/test.json', '{\"ok\":true}'); console.log('fs OK:', require('fs').readFileSync('/tmp/n8n-audit-test/test.json','utf8'));" 2>/dev/null || echo "node fs test failed"

echo "=== CREATE AUDIT PATH ==="
sudo mkdir -p /opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/compliance
sudo mkdir -p /opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/approvals
sudo mkdir -p /opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/promotions
sudo mkdir -p /opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/rollbacks
sudo mkdir -p /opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/incidents
sudo chown -R jose:jose /opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit
ls -la /opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/
